overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking along a dirt path through rural grasslands at dusk. The character passes by wooden gallows with hanged bodies and continues into open fields surrounded by autumn trees and distant mountains under a purple-orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassland with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords on back, approaching wooden structures in the distance

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence running parallel to the path
worn dirt trail cutting through tall grass
wooden gallows structure with crossbeam visible on the horizon
mountain range silhouetted against the purple sky
autumn-colored deciduous trees dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following a white-haired character walking along a dirt path through rural grasslands at dusk. A wooden fence lines the left side of the path while open fields stretch to the right. In the distance, wooden gallows structures are visible against a purple-orange sky, with mountains silhouetted on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: path passing wooden gallows with hanged bodies

events.description: character passes by wooden gallows with hanged bodies suspended from the crossbeams on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past the gallows structure, glancing at the hanged bodies to the left while continuing along the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the wooden gallows structure, revealing hanged bodies suspended from the crossbeams. The wooden fence falls behind as the path continues through taller grass. The lighting remains dim with the purple dusk sky overhead, creating a somber atmosphere as the character moves past the execution site.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail approaching forest line

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through tall grass toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: tall golden-brown grass lining both sides of the path
dense line of pine and deciduous trees marking the horizon
clusters of white wildflowers growing in the tall grass

segments.scene_description: Having passed the gallows, the character continues through open grasslands with tall vegetation on both sides of the trail. The path winds toward a distant forest line silhouetted against the deepening dusk sky. White wildflowers are visible in the grass to the right as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural grassland at dusk that transitions from a scenic path into a somber execution site and back into the open wild. It begins by following a white-haired character along a dirt path lined by a wooden fence, with distant gallows and silhouetted mountains visible under a purple-orange sky. As the character advances, the scene shifts to a grim focus on the wooden gallows, revealing hanged bodies suspended from the beams while the fence recedes into the background. The camera then carries the character away from the execution site and into expanses of taller grass and white wildflowers. Finally, the path winds through the deepening dusk toward a distant, silhouetted forest line.
